message:
🐛 Fix auto-scroll, Update Now feedback, and GitHub rate-limit handling (#1295)

* 🐛 Fix auto-scroll, Update Now feedback, and GitHub rate-limit handling

- Settings deep-link: retry scroll with rAF and only act on /settings pathname
  (fixes KeepAlive caching preventing scroll to update section)
- Update Now button: show loading spinner and error message when kc-agent
  /auto-update/trigger returns 404 (endpoint not available in Homebrew build)
- GitHub API 403/429: back off for 15 minutes, show rate-limit error in UI,
  suggest adding GitHub token for higher limits
- Add console.debug logging throughout version-check for debugging
- Commit comparison API respects rate-limit backoff

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add GitHub token prereq and clickable fix links to prereq checklist

- New "GitHub token" prerequisite row in Environment section
- Failed prereqs show a clickable "Configure" / "Add token" link
  that scrolls to the relevant settings section (agent, GitHub token)
- GitHub token check included in prereq summary count

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -526,12 +526,18 @@
       "prereqKCAgent": "kc-agent",
       "prereqKCAgentOk": "Connected",
       "prereqKCAgentFail": "Not detected",
+      "prereqKCAgentFix": "Configure",
       "prereqCodingAgent": "Coding agent",
       "prereqCodingAgentOk": "Detected",
       "prereqCodingAgentFail": "Not detected",
+      "prereqCodingAgentFix": "Configure",
       "prereqOAuth": "OAuth",
       "prereqOAuthOk": "Configured",
       "prereqOAuthFail": "Not configured",
+      "prereqGithubToken": "GitHub token",
+      "prereqGithubTokenOk": "Configured",
+      "prereqGithubTokenFail": "Not set",
+      "prereqGithubTokenFix": "Add token",
       "prereqInstall": "Install mode",
       "prereqInstallOk": "Source (dev)",
       "prereqInstallFail": "Not source mode",
